public_surface.function: render(latex: string, target: HTMLElement) -> { ok: true } | { ok: false, message: string }

katex_api_used: katex.render(latex, target, { throwOnError: true, displayMode: true })
depends_on_runtime: KaTeX 0.16.9 (loaded from CDN by index.html before renderer.js)
verification_notes: Single render export; signature matches contract; no exception escapes try/catch; empty input clears target; uses displayMode:true.
